parameters-en.Position: Adjusts the position or frequency of the wah effect. By default, this is assigned to Expression Pedal 1.
parameters-en.Fc Low: Sets the low frequency cutoff of the wah filter. Along with Fc High, sets the frequency range or sweep of the wah.
parameters-en.Fc High: Sets the high frequency cutoff of the wah filter. Along with Fc Low, sets the frequency range or sweep of the wah.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the wah effect and the dry signal. At 0%, no wah effect is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard. If the wah effect is a bit strong, consider bringing this down a bit.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the Wah block.
